texto: [Some dogs] develop blood feuds with other dogs that are so serious that the only silver lining is a dog's inability to build nuclear weapons in the backyard. -- Patricia McConnell, A Tale of Two Species
explicacao: Orientação direta de Patricia McConnell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “[Some dogs] develop blood feuds with other dogs that are so serious that the only silver lining i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, dogs, develop, útil em momentos de reflexao.
